name: Beer Braised Beef in Crock Pot
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Lean beef stew meat, cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces
12 oz. beer (I prefer a dark beer, and my favorite dark beer is Negro Modelo, a Mexican Beer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the beef in the crock pot.
2. Combine all the other ingredients and pour over the beef.
3. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4-5 hours.
4. Before serving, thicken juices if desired (Joyce says she uses some flour or corn starch to do this).
